summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Angola Marketplace MVP with Taxi and Restaurant modules. All core functionality works correctly including authentication, taxi price comparison, restaurant ordering, and checkout flow.

design_issues.issue: Only 3/5 navigation items detected during testing (functionality works but selectors might have issues)

passed_tests: Taxi price comparison with 4 providers (Yango, Heetch, Ugo, Tupuca Taxi)
Restaurant menu browsing (4 items per category)
Checkout process with address and payment method selection
Profile page with user information display
Landing page with Angola design colors
Angola payment methods simulation (Multicaixa Express, Unitel Money, BAI Paga)
